raw_payload.subject: IFG / Linwood — intro call
raw_payload.body: Intro call between Sam (IFG), Elena Park (CEPA advisor at Cepa Advisors), and Tom Linwood, founder-CEO of Linwood Manufacturing. Tom is exploring a potential exit in the 18-24 month window. Discussed valuation expectations (he's anchored around 8x EBITDA based on a comp from a competitor sale last year), customer concentration risk (top 3 customers = 52% of revenue), and the fact that his COO is not yet ready to step into a CEO role post-transaction. Elena is helping him on the personal financial planning side. Sam offered to put together a one-page market read on multiples in his segment and to walk through what a typical IFG-led process looks like. Agreed to reconvene in two weeks.
next_steps: Sam to send a one-page market read on multiples in Tom's segment within 1 week
Sam to share IFG's standard process timeline document
Reconvene as a group in two weeks to discuss Tom's reaction and decide next steps
